specs.title: forgot password back to login link works
accessing protected route without auth redirects to login
users table shows row selection checkboxes
select all checkbox toggles all rows
shows validation error for empty email
shows success state after submitting email
shows invalid token message without token
renders reset form with valid token
shows validation errors for empty fields
shows mismatch error when passwords differ
shipments tab has lookup and create
zone edit dialog opens via actions menu
set stock dialog opens and has required fields
can close create dialog with cancel
shows export dropdown with CSV, Excel, PDF options
renders dashboard heading and quick actions
navigates to products on Add Product click
displays stat cards or loading skeletons
create user via dialog and verify toast
export dropdown shows CSV, Excel, PDF options
validates required fields on category create
